issue.message: Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `toUpperCase(Locale)` instead. For strings meant to be internal use `Locale.ROOT`, otherwise `Locale.getDefault()`.
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `toUpperCase(Locale)` instead. For strings meant to be internal use `Locale.ROOT`, otherwise `Locale.getDefault()`.
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `toUpperCase(Locale)` instead. For strings meant to be internal use `Locale.ROOT`, otherwise `Locale.getDefault()`.
The application should not provide its own launch screen

A newer version of com.google.android.material:material than 1.13.0 is available: 1.14.0
A newer version of org.jetbrains.kotlin:kotlin-stdlib than 2.1.0 is available: 2.2.21
A newer version of androidx.room:room-compiler than 2.7.1 is available: 2.8.4
A newer version of androidx.room:room-runtime than 2.7.1 is available: 2.8.4
A newer version of org.jetbrains.kotlin.android than 2.1.0 is available: 2.3.21
A newer version of org.jetbrains.kotlin.kapt than 2.1.0 is available: 2.3.21
A newer version of com.squareup.okhttp3:logging-interceptor than 4.12.0 is available: 5.3.2
A newer version of com.squareup.okhttp3:okhttp than 4.12.0 is available: 5.3.2
A newer version of com.google.code.gson:gson than 2.11.0 is available: 2.14.0

issue.errorLine1: <string name="perfil_logout_message">¿Estás seguro de que deseas cerrar sesión?</string>

issue.message: It will always be more efficient to use more specific change events if you can. Rely on `notifyDataSetChanged` as a last resort.
It will always be more efficient to use more specific change events if you can. Rely on `notifyDataSetChanged` as a last resort.
